name: Cell Source, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Our Business We are a cell therapy company focused on immunotherapy. Since our inception, we have been involved with the development of proprietary immune system management technology (Cell Source technology) licensed from Yeda Research & Development Company Limited (Yeda), the commercial arm of the Weizmann Institute of Science (Weizmann Institute) in Israel.
